infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: PrajaShakti needs camera access to capture issue evidence and your profile photo.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: PrajaShakti needs photo library access to upload evidence and your profile photo.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: PrajaShakti uses your location to find issues near you.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: PrajaShakti needs microphone access to record video evidence.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: PrajaShakti uses Face ID so you can log in without entering an OTP every time.
